title.en: The Lord of Ice and Rain also went to help, but...

content.en:
Ye Tian knew the value of the Origin Worm Hive from the mouth of the Lord of Ice and Rain, and it was a precious treasure for the geniuses on the other side of the Origin Realm, and even for Wind Tooth Island.

Of course.

The entry of the Immortal Island Alliance also made them angry, so they needed to stop it.

Subsequently.

The Lord of Ice and Rain also went to help, but he didn't let Ye Tian pass.

After all, he is only a nine-time bone transformation realm genius now, and he can't help!

However, he could communicate with other geniuses on Wind Tooth Island and learn about this matter in real time.

......

Origins above the Black River.

The Origin Realm of the Wind Tooth Island and the Immortal Island Alliance are all looking for the Origin Worm Mother, and both sides have used various means.

With their background, there is no problem in finding the original worm mother, it is only a matter of time.

Some time passes.

Suddenly.

The Origin Realm of the Immortal Island Alliance was the first to lock on to the Origin Worm Mother.

So, they immediately began to surround this Origin Worm Mother, learning a lesson, and would not let it escape again.

I saw a majestic figure appear around the Origin Insect Mother, standing on the Origin Black River, using various means to block this place.

Rumble!!!

The Origin Mother tried to shuttle away, but was intercepted directly on top of an invisible barrier.

I saw that this barrier continued to shrink, and it would eventually catch this Origin Worm Mother.

Abrupt.

A voice came.

"Lord of Hao, the Immortal Island Alliance actually sent you, are you provoking us by invading our Fengya Island territory like this?"

The Lord of Ice and Rain appeared, followed by other island owners and a group of geniuses from the other side.

The Heavenly Ancestor of the Origin Middle Realm, known as the Lord of Hao, is the first Origin Origin Middle Realm of the Immortal Island Alliance, and his strength is about the same as that of the Lord of Ice and Rain.

"Lord of Ice and Rain, we didn't provoke your Wind Tooth Island, it's just that a pet of our Immortal Island Alliance escaped and was captured. On the contrary, it was you Wind Tooth Island, but you captured one of our Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors, could it be that you want to start a war with us?"

The Lord of Hellho said.

Pet?

The Lord of Ice and Rain naturally didn't believe it.

"In a word, give us this Origin Worm Mother, and we will return your Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestor to you. The Lord of Ice and Rain proposed.

"It can't be!"

The Lord of Prison refused.

The value of an Origin Worm Mother does not lie in itself, but in the Origin Worm Hive behind it, which is more important than a Origin Realm level genius!

"If you don't want to, then fight!" the Lord of Ice and Rain smiled, "In terms of strength, my side is even stronger, and your Immortal Island Alliance Headquarters is farther away from here, and the speed of support can't keep up with our Wind Tooth Island." When war breaks out, it is you who suffer. "

When the Lord of Hao Prison heard this, he frowned slightly, and he also admitted that what the Lord of Ice and Rain said was very reasonable.

If they really fight, they will suffer, and even suffer heavy losses, and it will not be worth it then.

"Is it possible that you dare to go to war, we have suffered heavy losses, but you also have to kill a group of Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors. When the time comes, even if you obtain the Origin Hive, you will not be able to make up for the loss. The Lord of Hao Prison said.

"How about the old rules?"

The Lord of Ice and Rain said.

The Lord of Hao Prison was silent for a moment, then communicated with the other Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors of the Immortal Island, and finally nodded.

"Okay, then follow the old rules!"

The Lord of Hellho agreed.

The so-called old rule, that is, the two sides each sent ten nine Bone Transformation Realm other side level geniuses to fight, and the competition was in the way of wheel warfare, and whichever side of the other side level genius was the first to be eliminated, then the game was lost.

Of course.

Both sides also have time to prepare, and once the game starts, there is no turning back.

"Make an oath of Origin on the other side of eternity!"

The Lord of the Ice and Rain proposed.

Subsequently, the two parties made an oath and signed a contract.

They agreed that after a thousand primeval years, they would play here.

And this Origin Worm Mother was temporarily sealed, and no one could move it.

......

Wind Tooth Island, Ice Rain Island.

Soon.

Ye Tian knew the specific situation.

"The Alliance of Wind Tooth Island and Immortal Island has not fought!"

He thought that the two sides would fight again, but it turned out to be a game to determine the ownership of the Origin Worm Mother.

"Whether it's Wind Tooth Island or the Immortal Island Alliance, they don't want to lose a lot, otherwise it's not worth it if they gain some resources and lose a lot of other shore-level geniuses!" Ye Tian muttered.

Soon after.

The Lord of Ice and Rain came back and summoned Ye Tian over as soon as possible.

"Lord of Ice and Rain!"

Ye Tian said respectfully.

At this time, the Lord of Ice and Rain said, "Lord of Endless, this battle with the Immortal Island Alliance depends on you. There are indeed a lot of Nine-Bone Transformation Realm Geniuses on Wind Tooth Island, and some have been cultivated locally, but most of them are average, and now that you have broken through to the Nine-Bone Transformation Realm, your strength far surpasses that of other Other-level geniuses, so if you make a move this time, we have a great chance of winning!"

Ye Tian immediately made a request, "Lord of Ice and Rain, if I help Wind Tooth Island win the competition, can I get some resource benefits in the Origin Worm Hive?"

After all, he doesn't do anything good.

The Lord of Ice and Rain didn't think about it, and directly agreed.

"No problem!" agreed, the Lord of Ice and Rain.

And in the next thousand primeval eras, if you want to quickly improve your strength, it will be almost impossible!

However, he still has to improve a little bit.

Thereupon.

He was ready to create an even more powerful Divine Skill on the other side, as well as to improve the Origin Will a little more.

Time flies.

In the blink of an eye, a thousand primeval epochs have passed.

this day.

Ten Nine Bone Transformation Realm Peer-level geniuses gathered here.

Except for Ye Tian and the Lord of Tiandu, the other nine Bone Transformation Realm other side level geniuses are not this batch of other shore level geniuses, but nine bone transformation realm geniuses recruited from other channels, and they have been cultivating on Wind Tooth Island for countless years, and their strength is very strong.

......

Origin Black River.

It's still the same place it was.

The Lord of Ice and Rain, as well as other island masters and Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors of Wind Tooth Island, have all come here, and the powerhouses of the Immortal Island Alliance are also here.

Moreover, they also brought ten Ninth Bone Transformation Realm Peer-level geniuses.

And Ye Tian was arranged to shoot in the sixth place, and the reason why he was not in the last place was because he was afraid of accidents.

If he made a move in the sixth place, he would directly eliminate the other nineth-time bone transformation realm level geniuses in the Immortal Island Alliance.

If there was a more powerful other shore-level genius than Ye Tian, Ye Tian only needed to hit the other party hard, and he could create hope for the other shore-level genius behind Fengya Island to win.
